creator: walker.aj325@gmail.com
text:
I tried booting the 64bit GhostBSD 3.5 DVD on my MacBook 4.1 (2008 model
with 2.4ghz C2D and intel X3100 graphics). The system paniced partway
through the boot process with the following error message:

ACPI APIC Table: <APPLE Apple00>
panic: AP #1 (PHY# 1) failed!
cpuid = 0
KDB: stack backtrace:
#0 0xffffffff8094f7f6 at kdb_backtrace+0x66
#1 0xffffffff8091850e at panic+0x1ce
#2 0xffffffff80c07a19 at cpu_mp_start +0x579
#3 0xffffffff8095aede at smp_no_rendevous_barrier+0x7e
#4 0xffffffff808c8df7 at mi_startup+0x77
#5 0xffffffff802b6bac at btext +0x22

How-To-Repeat: Attempt booting FreeBSD installation media.
